title: Military Balance+
gist: Product marketing page for IISS's Military Balance+ online defence database, covering equipment, budgets, procurement, personnel and deployments across 170+ countries. Contains little analytical signal beyond product scope data points.

insights.claim: IISS's Military Balance+ provides searchable defence data on military capabilities, policy priorities and commercial opportunities across more than 170 countries.
insights.speaker: IISS
insights.so_what: A commercial data source for tracking global defence capability and procurement trends across nearly all states.
insights.locator: Military Balance+ | The online defence database

insights.claim: Military Balance+ offers multi-year defence budget forecasts for 30 countries that together account for 88% of global defence expenditure.
insights.speaker: IISS
insights.so_what: Concentration of global defence spend in ~30 countries frames where defence-sector capital and procurement demand is actually forecastable.
insights.quote: view defence budget forecasts for 30 countries, accounting for 88% of global defence expenditure

insights.claim: The database includes procurement data by government recipient, identifying prime and subcontractors and equipment types per programme, alongside emerging procurement opportunities by country.
insights.speaker: IISS
insights.so_what: A prime/subcontractor mapping resource useful for sourcing defence-industrial investment and supply-chain leads.
